title: Alphabetical Test
blurb: Letter positions, order, and alphabet reasoning.

theory.intro: In this test, questions are asked on the location and occurrence of the each alphabet.

sections.title: Worked examples
paragraphs: Answer: The 10th letter of alphabet is 'J'.

examples.stem: Write down the 10th letter of the alphabet?

questions.question: ASRQRPRQNRNQSRQRQS How many Q's are preceded by and succeeded by R?
Point out the fourth consonant after third vowel in the alphabets?
Which letter is seven letters ahead of the letter which follows fourth letter from the right?
Which letter is in the middle of the two letters—one is second from 'J' in the right side and the other is third from 'Q' in the left side?
Which letter is three letters ahead of the letter which follows 'A' and precedes 'C'?
Which letter precedes the letter which is 13th from D?
The total number of letters in between the two pairs of vowel 'EO' and 'OQ' are?
Find the letter which is as far behind N in the alphabet as first E is behind the second S in the word. EXCOMMUNICATE?
Find the letter which is as far ahead of M in the alphabet as the first O is behind the second E in the word. LABORIOUS?
